name: io.github.szhygulin/vaultpilot-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Custom Ethereum RPC endpoint (alternative to RPC_PROVIDER + RPC_API_KEY).
environmentVariables.name: ETHEREUM_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: RPC provider name: 'infura' or 'alchemy'. Used together with RPC_API_KEY.
environmentVariables.name: RPC_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: API key for the chosen RPC_PROVIDER.
environmentVariables.name: RPC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Etherscan API key for contract verification lookups.
environmentVariables.name: ETHERSCAN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: 1inch Developer Portal API key. Enables 1inch quote comparison in get_swap_quote.
environmentVariables.name: ONEINCH_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: WalletConnect Cloud project ID. Required for Ledger Live signing via WalletConnect.
environmentVariables.name: WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID
